title: Donut Panic
short_description: An anomaly horror game with a cooking sim twist — take orders, serve donuts, and run when the hallucinations hit.
description: Order up! DONUT PANIC is an anomaly horror game with a cooking sim twist. Take customer orders. Prepare and serve up delicious donuts. But when the hallucinations appear, run for your life. Your panic room is there for a reason...

news.title: Order Up: Farewell North Creator Kyle Banks Returns with Anomaly Horror 'Donut Panic'
